title: PPL Corporation names Christine M. Martin interim president of PPL Electric Utilities

title: PPL to Pay Quarterly Stock Dividend October 2, 2023
text: ALLENTOWN, Pa. , Aug. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PPL Corporation (NYSE: PPL) declared a quarterly common stock dividend on Friday, August 25, of $0.24 per share, payable October 2, 2023, to shareowners of record as of September 8, 2023.

title: PPL Rides on Investments, Focuses on Clean Power Generation
text: PPL is expected to further gain from its ongoing capital investments, completed acquisition, and savings in operation and maintenance costs.

title: PPL Corporation (PPL) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 4, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Andy Ludwig - Vice President, Investor Relations Vince Sorgi - President and Chief Executive Officer Joe Bergstein - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI Paul Zimbardo - Bank of America David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Gregg Orrill - UBS Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho Operator Good day, and welcome to the PPL Corporation Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] Note that this event is being recorded.

title: PPL Q2 Earnings Fall Short of Estimates, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: PPL's second-quarter 2023 earnings decline year over year, while revenues increase. Total electricity sales decline during the same period.

title: PPL (PPL) Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: PPL (PPL) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.29 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.32 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.30 per share a year ago.

title: PPL Corporation Reports Second-Quarter 2023 Earnings
text: Announces 2023 second-quarter reported earnings (GAAP) per share of $0.15. Achieves 2023 second-quarter ongoing earnings per share of $0.29 vs.

title: What You Need to Know Ahead of PPL Q2 Earnings
text: PPL's Q2 2023 results are expected to benefit from ongoing capital investments and operation and maintenance cost savings. However, higher interest expenses might have impacted negatively.
